title: Registered Reports Explained
script_summary: A concise explanation of registered reports in science, highlighting their significance and how they differ from common misunderstandings.

segments.voiceover: Science has a clearer story about registered reports than social media does.
Registered reports are research plans peer-reviewed before data collection.
This means results aren't cherry-picked. Transparency is key.
Studies show registered reports can reduce bias and improve reproducibility.
In a world full of misinformation, registered reports shine a light on rigorous science.
Want to explore more about how science works? Like and follow for truth in research!
